name: narrative-pr59-single-turn
_notes: PR #59 narrative-video scenario: one slow right-page forward turn with a vertical drag component. The vertical component pushes effS toward the corner-to-corner distance (~1.7W) which is the regime that, without the curl-angle clamp, makes theta = effS/R exceed 2*PI and wrap the page into a tube. Captured twice: once with MAX_CURL_ANGLE temporarily reverted (pre-fix) and once with the clamp in place (post-fix). 1280x720@30fps so the recording can be spliced directly into the story video without scaling.
